name: ajbm
description: Claude Code skills by Andre Machon - development, business, security, interview, communication, and agent alignment

plugins.name: ajbm-dev
plugins.description: Skills and agents for software development: debugging, testing, spec writing, linting, prompt engineering, skill authoring, documentation research, and clean code review.

plugins.name: ajbm-business
plugins.description: Skills for business and marketing: offer creation (Hormozi methodology), pricing, copywriting, and Twitter/X content.

plugins.name: ajbm-security
plugins.description: Security guardrails for Claude Code. Blocks dangerous bash commands and sensitive file access. Enable/disable via plugin settings.

plugins.name: ajbm-social
plugins.description: Skills for social media: Twitter/X bookmark management, search, timeline reading, posting, and content workflows.

plugins.name: ajbm-interview
plugins.description: Structured elicitation and spec crystallization through rigorous challenge, assumption surfacing, and constraint enforcement. Workflows: DevSpec, BusinessIdea, DocumentDraft, DesignReview, Ideation, DevilsAdvocate, QuickClarify.

plugins.name: ajbm-communication
plugins.description: Skills for negotiation, persuasion, and human communication. Includes tactical-empathy (Chris Voss methodology with situation analysis and roleplay sparring).

plugins.name: ajbm-agent-align
plugins.description: Structured AI-to-AI alignment protocol for multi-agent delegation. Three graduated levels (Inline, Quick, Full) with constraint inheritance chains.
